name: slicer-skills
description: Slice-first workflow skills for Codex agents.

interface.shortDescription: Slice-first workflow skills for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: Slicer Skills helps Codex agents scout context first, use checkpoints for meaningful decisions, plan work in reviewable slices, execute one approved slice at a time, and debug from root cause.
defaultPrompt: Use $slicer-planning to split this into slices.
